languages.text: "Как такое может быть?.. " {n}Леди-навигатор недоуменно взмахивает ресницами, рассеянно глядя перед собой.{/n} "Море Душ безмятежно, однако же сам холст {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Материума{/g} распался и собрался вновь, заполняясь иными образами. Я... не могу описать этого. Это что-то чуждое. Иное".

traits.locale_text: "Как такое может быть?.. " {n}Леди-навигатор недоуменно взмахивает ресницами, рассеянно глядя перед собой.{/n} "Море Душ безмятежно, однако же сам холст {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Материума{/g} распался и собрался вновь, заполняясь иными образами. Я... не могу описать этого. Это что-то чуждое. Иное".
traits.speaker: CassiaCompanion

languages.text: "How can this be...? " {n}The Lady Navigator blinks in puzzlement, her lashes fluttering as she stares dazedly ahead.{/n} "The Sea of Souls is placid, yet the very canvas of the {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} has disintegrated and reformed, filling up with other images. I... cannot describe it. It is something strange. Something other."
languages.original_text: "Как такое может быть?.. Я... не могу описать этого. Это что-то чуждое. Иное".

I... cannot describe it. It is something strange. Something other."

"How can this be...? " {n}The Lady Navigator blinks in puzzlement, her lashes fluttering as she stares dazedly ahead.{/n} "The Sea of Souls is placid, yet the very canvas of the {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} has disintegrated and reformed, filling up with other images. I... cannot describe it. It is something strange. Something other."

languages.text: “这怎么可能……？”{n}导航者女士困惑地眨着眼，睫毛颤动，茫然地凝视着前方。{/n}“灵魂之海平静无波，然而{g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}真实世界{/g}的画卷却崩解重组，被其他景象填充。我……无法形容。这感觉很古怪，很异样。”
languages.original_text: "How can this be...? " {n}The Lady Navigator blinks in puzzlement, her lashes fluttering as she stares dazedly ahead.{/n} "The Sea of Souls is placid, yet the very canvas of the {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} has disintegrated and reformed, filling up with other images. I... cannot describe it. It is something strange. Something other."

traits.locale_text: “这怎么可能……？”{n}导航者女士困惑地眨着眼，睫毛颤动，茫然地凝视着前方。{/n}“灵魂之海平静无波，然而{g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}真实世界{/g}的画卷却崩解重组，被其他景象填充。我……无法形容。这感觉很古怪，很异样。”

languages.text: « Comment est-ce possible... ? » {n}Décontenancée, la dame navigatrice cligne des yeux, ses cils battant comme les ailes d'un papillon alors qu'elle fixe l'horizon d'un air hagard.{/n} « La Mer des âmes a beau être calme, la trame même du {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} s'est désintégrée avant de se reconstituer avec des images alternatives. Je... je ne sais comment l'expliquer. C'est un phénomène étrange. Quelque chose qui n'est pas de ce monde. »
languages.original_text: "How can this be...? " {n}The Lady Navigator blinks in puzzlement, her lashes fluttering as she stares dazedly ahead.{/n} "The Sea of Souls is placid, yet the very canvas of the {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} has disintegrated and reformed, filling up with other images. I... cannot describe it. It is something strange. Something other."

traits.locale_text: « Comment est-ce possible... ? » {n}Décontenancée, la dame navigatrice cligne des yeux, ses cils battant comme les ailes d'un papillon alors qu'elle fixe l'horizon d'un air hagard.{/n} « La Mer des âmes a beau être calme, la trame même du {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} s'est désintégrée avant de se reconstituer avec des images alternatives. Je... je ne sais comment l'expliquer. C'est un phénomène étrange. Quelque chose qui n'est pas de ce monde. »

languages.text: "Bu nasıl olabilir?" {n}Leydi Rotacı, hayretler içinde gözlerini kırpıştırıyor. Şaşkınlıkla dümdüz ileriye bakarken kirpikleri titriyor.{/n} "Ruhlar Denizi sakin ancak {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Maddiyar'ın{/g} bizzat dokusu parçalanıp yeniden oluştu ve başka imgelerle doldu. Ben... Tarif etmekte zorlanıyorum. Çok tuhaf bir şey. Başka bir şey."
languages.original_text: "How can this be...? " {n}The Lady Navigator blinks in puzzlement, her lashes fluttering as she stares dazedly ahead.{/n} "The Sea of Souls is placid, yet the very canvas of the {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} has disintegrated and reformed, filling up with other images. I... cannot describe it. It is something strange. Something other."

traits.locale_text: "Bu nasıl olabilir?" {n}Leydi Rotacı, hayretler içinde gözlerini kırpıştırıyor. Şaşkınlıkla dümdüz ileriye bakarken kirpikleri titriyor.{/n} "Ruhlar Denizi sakin ancak {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Maddiyar'ın{/g} bizzat dokusu parçalanıp yeniden oluştu ve başka imgelerle doldu. Ben... Tarif etmekte zorlanıyorum. Çok tuhaf bir şey. Başka bir şey."

languages.text: «¿Cómo es posible...?». {n}La lady Navegante parpadea, perpleja, pestañeando y mirando hacia delante.{/n} «El Mar de Almas está tranquilo, pero el propio lienzo del {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}materio{/g} se ha desintegrado y reformado, lleno de otras imágenes. No... no puedo describirlo. Es algo extraño. Algo ajeno».
languages.original_text: "How can this be...? " {n}The Lady Navigator blinks in puzzlement, her lashes fluttering as she stares dazedly ahead.{/n} "The Sea of Souls is placid, yet the very canvas of the {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} has disintegrated and reformed, filling up with other images. I... cannot describe it. It is something strange. Something other."

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo es posible...?». {n}La lady Navegante parpadea, perpleja, pestañeando y mirando hacia delante.{/n} «El Mar de Almas está tranquilo, pero el propio lienzo del {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}materio{/g} se ha desintegrado y reformado, lleno de otras imágenes. No... no puedo describirlo. Es algo extraño. Algo ajeno».

languages.text: "Wie kann das sein ...? " {n}Die Lady Navigator zwinkert verwirrt und starrt mit flatternden Wimpern ins Leere.{/n} "Das Meer der Seelen ist friedlich, doch die Leinwand des {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Realraums{/g} wurde desintegriert und mit anderen Bildern neu geformt. Ich ... kann es nicht beschreiben. Es ist etwas seltsames. Etwas anderes."
languages.original_text: "How can this be...? " {n}The Lady Navigator blinks in puzzlement, her lashes fluttering as she stares dazedly ahead.{/n} "The Sea of Souls is placid, yet the very canvas of the {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} has disintegrated and reformed, filling up with other images. I... cannot describe it. It is something strange. Something other."

traits.locale_text: "Wie kann das sein ...? " {n}Die Lady Navigator zwinkert verwirrt und starrt mit flatternden Wimpern ins Leere.{/n} "Das Meer der Seelen ist friedlich, doch die Leinwand des {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Realraums{/g} wurde desintegriert und mit anderen Bildern neu geformt. Ich ... kann es nicht beschreiben. Es ist etwas seltsames. Etwas anderes."

languages.text: 「どうなっているの...？」{n}ナビゲーターは困惑してまばたきを繰り返しながら、茫然と先を見つめる。{/n}「魂の海は穏やかだが、{g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}マテリアム{/g}のキャンバスそのものが崩壊し、新たな絵画に塗り替えられた。私は...言葉では言い表せない。奇妙な...異質な何かだ。」
languages.original_text: "How can this be...? " {n}The Lady Navigator blinks in puzzlement, her lashes fluttering as she stares dazedly ahead.{/n} "The Sea of Souls is placid, yet the very canvas of the {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} has disintegrated and reformed, filling up with other images. I... cannot describe it. It is something strange. Something other."

traits.locale_text: 「どうなっているの...？」{n}ナビゲーターは困惑してまばたきを繰り返しながら、茫然と先を見つめる。{/n}「魂の海は穏やかだが、{g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}マテリアム{/g}のキャンバスそのものが崩壊し、新たな絵画に塗り替えられた。私は...言葉では言い表せない。奇妙な...異質な何かだ。」
